old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-whr4.1","title":"[CODEREVIEW] hash consistency in Python CoAP LichenRemote","description":"python/src/lichen/coap/transport.py:133-134 uses built-in hash() which is salted/randomized per-process for security (prevents hash collision DoS but breaks determinism). Spec and Rust/C use hash_32 with fixed LICHEN key=0x4c494348 for slot/channel/shortaddr consistency across all 3 impls (see test/vectors/ccp15.json, spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:89, 02-physical-link.md:202). This causes different remote identification in aiocoap blockwise_key, potential cache misses or incorrect routing in Python sim/gateway. Security: potential for inconsistent TOFU pinning if used in key lookup. Add hash_32() to lichen/crypto/identity.py matching C's FNV-1a (h = (h ^ b) * PRIME). Update __hash__ and blockwise_key. Update all spec references to pin exact algo (FNV-1a with LICHEN seed, not SipHash). Update tests/test_transport.py and coap tests for new hash. Python/spec/coap/tests only per whr4.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-22T18:08:44.120127808Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-22T18:08:44.120127808Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-whr4.1","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-whr4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-22T18:08:44.234609782Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}
